applicability_notes: Unary elementwise activation; golden function is torch.nn.functional.hardshrink. Scalar parameter 'lambd' passed through directly with default 0.5. Fusable into unary op chains.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.hardshrink(input_tensor_a, lambd=lambd); constraints: {'lambd_default': 0.5, 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT required', 'pcc_threshold': 0.99}

placement_observations.source: test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input_tensor_a, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) — default interleaved DRAM memory config
test: no explicit memory_config passed to ttnn.hardshrink; inherits default interleaved DRAM
